The '''"Hatchling" maintenance droid''' was a common zero-G [[Maintenance droid/Legends|maintenance droid]] produced by the [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]] [[Roche Hive Mechanical Apparatus Design and Construction Activity for Those Who Need the Hive's Machines/Legends|Roche company]]. Based on a very popular line of [[Droid/Legends|droids]] used by the Verpine Hives, the "hatchling" was a single minded, but highly useful droid. Much larger than average maintenance droids, the "hatchling" found its home in busy [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceports]] and [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyards]].

Sporting the common [[Insect/Legends|insectile]] design scheme in use by the Roche company, this six-armed droid was the equivalent of a [[WED Treadwell repair droid/Legends|WED Treadwell]] in [[Realspace/Legends|space]]. Though too large to be a benefit to most [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]] [[Captain/Legends|captains]], larger [[Starship/Legends|ships]] were known to carry a few outfitted with [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]]. These modified drones were sent out with the sole purpose of hunting [[Mynock/Legends|mynocks]] feeding off the ship.

[[StarForge Station]], a popular [[Shadowport/Legends|shadowport]], was known to have three dozen of these droids in service, repairing ships and performing general maintenance.
